product.description: When you wash your hands with Soaply, you contribute to a positive impact on people and the environment: we create better working and living conditions for the super shell farmers and our social workers, replace synthetic raw materials with 100% natural ingredients and recycle plastic. Will you join us?

metaData.Key Information: Soaply 100% natural hand soap with Eucalyptus and Rosemary scent makes your hands naturally clean nd soft. 100% natural pH-skin neutral Vegan Bottle made of 97% recycled plastic Bcorp, Vegan Society
metaData.SAP Product Name: Soaply Hand Wash Eucalyptus and Rosemary
metaData.Storage Information: Store in a cool dry place

product.name: Soaply Hand Wash Eucalyptus and Rosemary

parentCategory.name: Beauty & Personal Care
parentCategory.tagLine: Bath & body, hair care, facial wash & more

metaData.Ingredients: Water, Sodium Laureth Sulphate, Glycerin, Alcohol, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Hexylene Glycol, PEG-12 Dimethicone, Fragrance, Prunus Persica (Peach) Leaf Extract, O-Cymen-5-Ol, Lauramine Oxide, Cocamide DEA, Sodium Benzoate, Citric Acid
metaData.Key Information:
• Provides effective protection against germs with anti-bacterial and anti-septic ingredients, yet is gentle on skin with 100% cleansing ingredients from plants
• Dispenses creamy foam that helps to clean all parts of hands easily and more thoroughly than ordinary liquid hand soap
• Keeps skin moisturized with peach extracts that is naturally rich in Vitamins and leaves a mild fruity Peach fragrance after wash
metaData.SAP Product Name: KIREI KIREI ANTI-BACTERIAL FOAMING HAND SOAP REFILL - MOISTURIZING PEACH 200ML

product.name: Kirei Kirei Anti-bacterial Hand Soap Refill - Moisturizing Peach

parentCategory.name: Beauty & Personal Care
parentCategory.tagLine: Bath & body, hair care, facial wash & more

metaData.Ingredients: Water, Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Glycerin, Alcohol, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Peg-12 Dimethicone, Sodium Benzoate, Citric Acid, Lauramine Oxide, Fragrance, O-Cymen-5-Ol, Morus Alba Root Extract
metaData.Key Information:
• Provides effective protection against germs with anti-bacterial and anti-septic ingredients, yet is gentle on skin with 100% cleansing ingredients from plants
• Dispenses creamy foam that helps to clean all parts of hands easily and more thoroughly than ordinary liquid hand soap
• Cares for delicate skin with mulberry extracts that is naturally high in antioxidants and rich in Vitamins Sweet berry fragrance
metaData.Preparation:
1. For hygiene purpose, wash the bottle and pump and dry them well before refilling
2. Wash the pump without pumping to avoid water remain inside the pump
3. If there is water inside the pump, foam may not be generated

product.description: Gentle for kids and enriched with aloe vera, FairPrice Anti-Bacterial Foaming Handsoap kills 99.9% of bacteria, is pH balanced, paraben and MIT free.

metaData.Ingredients: Water, Sodium laureth sulfate, Cocamidopropyl betaine, Glycerin, Sodium lauryl sulfate, Alcohol, Fragrance, Decyl glucoside, Polyquaternium-10, PEG-45M, Phenoxyethanol, O-cymen-5-ol, Aloe barbadensis leaf juice, Citric acid, Tetrasodium EDTA and Ethylhexylglycerin.
metaData.Key Information:
• Dermatologically Tested
• Gentle For Kids
• Refill pack for Fairprice Moisturising Foaming Hand Soap - Peach
• Antibacterial
• Safe for kids
• pH balanced
• Paraben free
• MIT free
• Contains aloe vera extracts
metaData.Preparation: Wash the FairPrice Foaming Hand Soap bottle and pump. Dry completely before refilling. Wash the pump without pumping it, as trapped water may prevent foam from generating. Place the bottle on a flat surface and carefully pour the refill into the bottle.
